calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nathan Borris appeared via zoom for Ben Wong (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding designation of the 529 accounts, and that the custodial parents would be named as successor owner of 529 accounts, who can administer them for the benefit of Sebastian Lisuke and Kaia Strzebniok who are minors. Petition for order confirming trust assets are taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Martin: Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Nov-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
